next_steps: Perform broad-spectrum CSF PCR panel including JC virus, VZV, HHV-6, HSV-1/2, CMV, and EBV.
Send CSF and serum for comprehensive paraneoplastic antibody evaluation (anti-Yo, anti-DNER/Tr, anti-Hu, etc.).
Perform a repeat lumbar puncture with larger volume CSF collection for cytology and specialized flow cytometry (if initial was low sensitivity).
Review MRI images for subtle leptomeningeal enhancement with gadolinium contrast or consider repeating with high-resolution sequences.
Perform systemic evaluation for occult malignancy (e.g., PET-CT) if neurolymphomatosis is suspected.
Avoid empiric corticosteroids until infectious etiologies are ruled out.
Consult neurology, infectious disease, and neuro-oncology for multidisciplinary management.
